languages.text: {n}Чудом распознав тварь в одном из технических помещений, стражи открыли по ней шквальный огонь. Энергетическое оружие и впрямь оказалась опасным для чудовища — оно обратилось в бегство, но из-за полученных ран уже не было столь стремительным и неуловимым, как раньше.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Чудом распознав тварь в одном из технических помещений, стражи открыли по ней шквальный огонь. Энергетическое оружие и впрямь оказалась опасным для чудовища — оно обратилось в бегство, но из-за полученных ран уже не было столь стремительным и неуловимым, как раньше.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Having miraculously recognised the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards unleashed a withering barrage upon it. Arc weapons did indeed prove dangerous to the xenos — it fled, but its wounds meant it was no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Чудом распознав тварь в одном из технических помещений, стражи открыли по ней шквальный огонь. Энергетическое оружие и впрямь оказалась опасным для чудовища — оно обратилось в бегство, но из-за полученных ран уже не было столь стремительным и неуловимым, как раньше.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Having miraculously identified the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards opened a withering barrage upon it. Energy weaponry did indeed prove dangerous to the beast. It fled, yet its wounds rendered it no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}

{n}Having miraculously identified the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards opened a withering barrage upon it. Energy weaponry did indeed prove dangerous to the beast. It fled, yet its wounds rendered it no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}

{n}Having miraculously recognised the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards unleashed a withering barrage upon it. Arc weapons did indeed prove dangerous to the xenos — it fled, but its wounds meant it was no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}

{n}Having miraculously recognised the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards unleashed a withering barrage upon it. Arc weapons did indeed prove dangerous to the xenos — it fled, but its wounds meant it was no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als sie die Kreatur in einer der Wartungskammern auf wundersame Weise erkannten, eröffneten die Wachen das Feuer. Lichtbogen-Waffen erwiesen sich für den Xenos tatsächlich als gefährlich ... er floh, war aufgrund seiner Wunden aber nicht mehr so flink wie zuvor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having miraculously recognised the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards unleashed a withering barrage upon it. Arc weapons did indeed prove dangerous to the xenos — it fled, but its wounds meant it was no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als sie die Kreatur in einer der Wartungskammern auf wundersame Weise erkannten, eröffneten die Wachen das Feuer. Lichtbogen-Waffen erwiesen sich für den Xenos tatsächlich als gefährlich ... er floh, war aufgrund seiner Wunden aber nicht mehr so flink wie zuvor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ayant découvert la créature dans l'une des salles de maintenance, les gardes déchaînèrent un barrage de tirs dévastateurs. Les armes électriques s'avérèrent très efficaces contre le xénos, qui s'enfuit à grand-peine en raison de ses blessures.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having miraculously recognised the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards unleashed a withering barrage upon it. Arc weapons did indeed prove dangerous to the xenos — it fled, but its wounds meant it was no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ayant découvert la créature dans l'une des salles de maintenance, les gardes déchaînèrent un barrage de tirs dévastateurs. Les armes électriques s'avérèrent très efficaces contre le xénos, qui s'enfuit à grand-peine en raison de ses blessures.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los guardias reconocieron milagrosamente a la criatura en una de las cámaras de mantenimiento y desataron un asalto implacable contra ella. Las armas voltaicas demostraron ser eficaces contra el xenos: huyó, pero sus heridas hicieron que fuera menos rápido y esquivo que antes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having miraculously recognised the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards unleashed a withering barrage upon it. Arc weapons did indeed prove dangerous to the xenos — it fled, but its wounds meant it was no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los guardias reconocieron milagrosamente a la criatura en una de las cámaras de mantenimiento y desataron un asalto implacable contra ella. Las armas voltaicas demostraron ser eficaces contra el xenos: huyó, pero sus heridas hicieron que fuera menos rápido y esquivo que antes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yaratığı bakım odalarından birinde mucizevi bir şekilde tanıyan muhafızlar, üzerine ezici bir yaylım ateşi açtı. Volt atım silahları, zeno için gerçekten de tehlikeli olduğunu kanıtladı. Yaratık kaçsa da yaraları, artık eskisi kadar hızlı ve yakalanması zor olmadığını gösterdi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having miraculously recognised the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards unleashed a withering barrage upon it. Arc weapons did indeed prove dangerous to the xenos — it fled, but its wounds meant it was no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yaratığı bakım odalarından birinde mucizevi bir şekilde tanıyan muhafızlar, üzerine ezici bir yaylım ateşi açtı. Volt atım silahları, zeno için gerçekten de tehlikeli olduğunu kanıtladı. Yaratık kaçsa da yaraları, artık eskisi kadar hızlı ve yakalanması zor olmadığını gösterdi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}守卫们奇迹般地在维修室中发现了那只生物，随即向它倾泻了猛烈的火力。事实证明，电弧武器确实对该异形造成了威胁。它虽然逃脱，但那伤势让它再也无法像先前那样迅捷难觅了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Having miraculously recognised the creature within one of the maintenance chambers, the guards unleashed a withering barrage upon it. Arc weapons did indeed prove dangerous to the xenos — it fled, but its wounds meant it was no longer as swift and elusive as before.{/n}
